title: cyperus urbani
intro: Cyperus urbani, also known as purple papyrus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus urbani include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Cyperus urbani can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
